name: Pre-Engineered Building Suppliers
description:
Pre-Engineered Building Suppliers Who Supply and Erect Across India

SAMAN is one of the few pre-engineered building suppliers in India that both supplies and erects the structure — you source the building and our crew stands it up, rather than receiving a pile of fabricated steel to manage yourself. The configuration on this page is a 120 × 30 × 20 ft PEB: 3,600 sq ft of column-free floor on a steel frame clad in PUF sandwich panels, supplied and erected for ₹19,25,000, inclusive of all taxes. Every member is fabricated at our own facilities in Bangalore and Greater Noida, then erected on your site by our own team.

A complete 3,600 sq ft pre-engineered building supplied and erected by SAMAN on an industrial site.

Supplier, Manufacturer or Turnkey Contractor — Which One Do You Actually Need?

A PEB supplier sells you the building and, in SAMAN's case, erects it on site. A manufacturer fabricates the steel and ships it for your team to put up. A turnkey contractor runs the whole project — design, approvals, civil work and handover. Most buyers searching for suppliers want the first: a building delivered and standing, without running a construction project.

Role What you receive Who erects it Choose this if…
PEB supplier (this page) A specified building, delivered + erected SAMAN's on-site crew you know the building you need and want it standing
PEB manufacturer Factory-fabricated steel components only Your own team / local contractor you already have an erection crew
Turnkey contractor Design, approvals, civil, structure, handover SAMAN, end to end you want one party accountable for everything

If you have your own crew and only need the fabricated steel shipped, that is a pre-engineered building manufacturer order, not a supply-and-erect one. If instead you want a single PEB supply company accountable for ground survey, civil work and building approvals as well, that is a managed turnkey PEB project rather than a supply order.

What You Get When SAMAN Is Your PEB Supplier

SAMAN's own crew erecting the steel frame — the on-site erection included in the supply scope.

Our scope of supply is fixed and stated up front, so a quote is a building, not a guess. It covers structural design to IS code, factory-fabricated primary and secondary members, Galvalume roof sheeting and PUF wall panels, transport to your site, on-site erection by our crew, and the IS-code documentation your building approval submission needs. What stays on your side is the groundwork: a level, accessible plot and a completed plinth or foundation cast to our drawing. This is a scope of supply, not a managed construction contract — which is exactly why it is faster to order and cheaper than a full project. Buyers who want a single pre-engineered building source for the structure but intend to handle their own civil and approvals fit this page precisely. The steel grades, bolt classes and clear spans behind the structure are set out on our steel members, bolts and spans page.

Supplying Across India — How a PEB Reaches and Stands at Your Site

Batched PEB components arriving on site — how SAMAN supplies buildings across India from two hubs.

Reach is the real test of a supplier, and it is where most pre-engineered building suppliers India lists fall short — they quote, then sub-contract a stranger to erect. We work from two manufacturing hubs: Bangalore covers the south and west, Greater Noida the north and east. Components for your building are batched and trucked together to avoid part-by-part delays, and the same company that fabricated them dispatches the erection crew.

SAMAN's own erection crew standing the building up — the same company that fabricates it.

Lead time is predictable for a structure this size: roughly three weeks of fabrication, a few days in transit, and ten to fourteen days of erection on site. From a confirmed order to a standing 3,600 sq ft building, expect about five to seven weeks, depending on your distance from the nearest hub.

What a Supplied-and-Erected PEB Costs

A completed 3,600 sq ft PEB supplied and erected for ₹19,25,000 — the configuration priced on this page.

The 120 × 30 × 20 ft / 3,600 sq ft configuration on this page is supplied and erected for ₹19,25,000, inclusive of all taxes. What moves a supply quote up or down is covered area, clear height, roof and wall specification, any crane or mezzanine provision, and distance from our Bangalore or Greater Noida hubs. Specification is the biggest single lever: a standard supplied-and-erected configuration like this one sits well below a heavy-duty, built-up-section structure engineered for higher loads or wider clear spans — that heavier specification is priced and detailed separately on our steel members, bolts and spans page. And if your requirement extends to civil work, statutory approvals and a single handover certificate, a managed turnkey PEB project is the better route than a supply order.

Pre-Engineered Building Suppliers — FAQs

Is a pre-engineered building supplier the same as a manufacturer?

Not quite. A manufacturer fabricates and ships the steel for someone else to erect; a supplier provides the building itself. SAMAN supplies and erects, so you receive a standing structure rather than components to assemble.

Do you supply only, or do you also erect the building on my site?

We do both. The price on this page includes erection by SAMAN's own crew. You provide the levelled plot and the foundation; we supply the structure and stand it up.

Do you supply and erect a PEB outside your factory cities?

Yes — we supply nationwide from Bangalore and Greater Noida and send our own erection crew to your site. Distance from the nearest hub only affects transport cost and lead time, both fixed at quote stage.

How long from order to a standing building?

For a 3,600 sq ft structure like this one, about five to seven weeks — roughly three weeks of fabrication, transit, and ten to fourteen days of on-site erection.

Get a Supply-and-Erect Quote for Your PEB

Send your size and site location for a same-day price and lead-time estimate.

Bangalore: Call +91 80886 85440 · WhatsApp +91 88616 22859

Delhi NCR: Call +91 87960 39938 · WhatsApp +91 97089 89937
